Air Freight
We are able to meet all global transportation needs around the world
by our best Air Freight Services both for Export and Import.
Discover more
Sea Freight
With a complete range of Sea Freight Services, we leverage volumes smartly to deliver competitive sea transportation in every major trade lane between USA, European , Canada, Far East Countries and others destination round the world.
Discover more
Customs Brokerage
Our expertise team is always ready to help importers and exporters with duty & tax issues such as tariffs. We can also inform the client the "entry procedures" specific to Bangladesh as well can include how the product is to be "classified," "valued" and documented.
Discover more
  • Air Freight Consolidation for
    Import and Export
  • Sea Freight Door to Door delivery
  • Customs Brokerage Receiving & Distributing

UNBEATABLE Freight Forwarding Services

Starting from loading to unloading and maintaining the highest standards in terms of safety while in transit, we take nothing to chance.

Learn More

Welcome to Daimon Logistics BD Ltd.

Daimon Logistics , a Bangladeshi freight forwarding and Logistics company was founded in 2012.

Daimon carries out air and sea forwarding, consolidation services, project forwarding and sea- air, air-sea, CHB and Trucking connected transportations in import and export fields. We have our own office both Dhaka and Chittagong to serve our customers.

Daimon maintains a customer, business and solution oriented relation with the companies receiving service. The main philosophy of Daimon Logistics Services is to be happy with its business partners, establish long term business partnerships and ensure its business partners receive the highest quality service for affordable cost.

Air Freight

We are able to  meet all global transportation needs around the world by our best Air Freight Services both for Export and Import.

Ocean Freight

With a complete range of Sea Freight Services, we leverage volumes smartly to deliver competitive sea transportation in every major  trade lane between USA, European , Canada, Far East Countries and

Customs Brokerage

Our expertise team is always ready to help importers and exporters with duty & tax issues such as tariffs.

Reach your destination 100% sure and safe

Just send us your questions and we will give you the help you need.

Daimon Logistics BD Ltd.

Daimon Logistics , a Bangladeshi freight forwarding and Logistics company was founded in 2012. Daimon carries out air and sea forwarding, consolidation services, project forwarding and sea- air, air-sea, CHB and Trucking connected transportations in import and export fields. We have our own office both Dhaka and Chittagong to serve our customers.
